name: Trout and Mushrooms in Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Small mushrooms (or large mushrooms, sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wide frying pan, melt butter over medium-high heat; add mushrooms and sauté, stirring frequently, until golden and brown (about 5 minutes). Stir in parsley, then remove the pan from heat and lift the mushrooms from the pan with a slotted spoon.
2. Arrange the mushrooms evenly to cover the bottom of a large warm serving platter; keep warm. Set the pan aside.
3. Wipe the fish with a damp cloth, inside cavities and outside. Coat the fish with flour; shake off excess. Arrange in a single layer on wax paper within reaching distance of the range.
4. Return the pan to medium heat; add salt to the remaining butter.
5. Place as many fish as will fit without crowding in the pan, turning once. Cook until the fish is lightly browned and flakes readily when prodded with a fork (for a 1-inch fish, allow 10 minutes total - 5 minutes on each side).
6. When the fish is done, remove from the pan and arrange on top of the mushrooms; keep warm.
7. Repeat the process with any remaining fish.
8. After removing the last fish, add lemon juice and cream to the pan; bring to a boil, stirring and scraping to blend with pan drippings. Spoon immediately over the fish and mushrooms and serve.
